creator: jj@commandline.de
text:
The csa driver doesn't play any sounds on recent -current-kernels. It
complains about "play interrupt" timeouts. The following is, what dmesg
says about my sound card:
csa0: <CS4280/CS4614/CS4622/CS4624/CS4630> mem 0xdb800000-0xdb8fffff,
0xdc000000-0xdc000fff irq 5 at device 13.0 on pci0
csa: card is Unknown/invalid SSID (CS4614)
pcm0: <CS461x PCM Audio> on csa0
midi0: <CS461x Midi Interface> on csa0

How-To-Repeat: use xmms to play mp3s ;)
